event: Portrait of a schoolboy in Christ's Hospital uniform
description: A young boy, perhaps ten or eleven years old, sits on a dark chair against a deep blue background. He wears the distinctive Christ's Hospital school uniform: a long dark navy-blue coat with a white clerical-style band at the collar, fastened with dark buttons down the front. His bare knees are visible below the coat, and he wears one yellow stocking on his right leg and one pale stocking on his left. His black buckled shoes rest on the floor. His hands are clasped loosely in his lap.

_meta.title: Constant Lambert as a Christ's Hospital Schoolboy
